---
title: "Mapping Sites"
author: "Kwasi Wrensford"
date: "2026-03-24"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(vroom)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggfortify)
library(ggrepel)
library(forcats)
library(lubridate)
library(unmarked)
library(camtrapR)
library(overlap)
library(ggmap)
library(reshape2)
library(corrplot)
library(elevatr)
library(terra)
library(mapview)
library(tmap)
library(sf)
library(exactextractr)
library(xml2)
library(geodata)
library(viridis)
```

##Load in covariate dataset with lat and long
```{r}
covars <- read.csv("data/covars.csv")

covars_sf <- st_as_sf(
  covars,
  coords = c("Longitude", "Latitude"),
  crs = 4326
)
```

```{r}
bbox <- st_bbox(covars_sf)

elev <- get_elev_raster(locations = covars_sf, z = 10, clip = "bbox")
elev <- rast(elev)

hill <- terrain(elev, v = "slope", unit = "radians")
aspect <- terrain(elev, v = "aspect", unit = "radians")
hillshade <- shade(hill, aspect)
hillshade_gray <- terra::app(hillshade, fun = mean)

map_pc1 <- 
  tm_shape(hillshade_gray) + 
  tm_raster(palette = gray.colors(100), alpha = 0.5) + 
  tm_shape(elev) + 
  tm_raster(palette = gray.colors(100), alpha = 0.4) + 
  tm_shape(covars_sf) + 
  tm_dots(col = "PC1", palette = "viridis", size = 0.5) +
  tm_layout(title = "Climate PC1 (Overall Climate)")

map_pc2 <- 
  tm_shape(hillshade_gray) + 
  tm_raster(palette = gray.colors(100), alpha = 0.5) + 
  tm_shape(elev) + 
  tm_raster(palette = gray.colors(100), alpha = 0.4) + 
  tm_shape(covars_sf) + 
  tm_dots(col = "PC2", palette = "viridis", size = 0.5) +
  tm_layout(title = "Climate PC2 (Aridity)")

map_hf <- 
  tm_shape(hillshade_gray) + 
  tm_raster(palette = gray.colors(100), alpha = 0.5) + 
  tm_shape(elev) + 
  tm_raster(palette = gray.colors(100), alpha = 0.4) + 
  tm_shape(covars_sf) + 
  tm_dots(col = "hf", palette = "viridis", size = 0.5) +
  tm_layout(title = "Human Footprint")

tmap_arrange(map_pc1, map_pc2, map_hf, ncol = 3)
```
